calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion
Off Calendar Apr-30-2010 Off Calendar

Notice Of Request For Assignment Order; Request For Judicial Notice
Off Calendar Apr-19-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Janet Brayer, Esq. for plaintiff and moving party JILL HERNANDEZ

Alan Moss, defendant in pro per, appeared by telephone

After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted, PLAINTIFF JILL HERNANDEZ's Request For Assignment Order; Request For Judicial Notice is Granted, up to 25% of the subject property. Moving party argues that there is no evidence the subject property constitutes the sole earnings of Moss, but Moss has in fact provided a declaration to that effect. Proposed order to be sent to Moss today and Court will hold order for 48 hours to permit any objections to form of order to be made by Moss. Judge: Curtis Karnow. Not Reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-14-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar May-12-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Janet Brayer, Esq. for Plaintiff: Jill Hernandez, present, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant Alan Moss as follows:
Damages 17,600.00
Prejudgment Interest $10,499.58
Costs $499.01, for a total of $28,598.59
Judgment signed in open court.
